C0.label: read_only_or_untrusted
C0.description: Unknown, weak, or untrusted model. May orient and summarize only.

C1.label: basic_helper
C1.description: Basic documentation and formatting tasks only.

C2.label: engineering_executor
C2.description: Local implementation, tests, scripts, and mechanical refactors.

C3.label: research_engineer
C3.description: Research design, architecture, evidence interpretation, cross-boundary changes.

C4.label: strategic_research_lead
C4.description: Root theory changes, safety-critical production changes, high-stakes optimization.

documentation_noncritical.description: Low-risk README or formatting work that does not change project decisions.

mechanical_implementation.description: Local implementation, tests, scripts, and mechanical changes.

cross_boundary_refactor.description: Refactor that crosses modules, contracts, layers, or disciplines.

research_design.description: Design a research program, experiment, simulation, proof path, or evidence protocol.

hypothesis_update.description: Create or revise hypothesis, evidence interpretation, or graph confidence.

architecture_decision.description: Durable architecture, interface, or project-system decision.

production_safety_critical.description: Live trading, flight/vehicle/manufacturing safety, capital allocation, or irreversible operations.

root_theory_revision.description: Change mission, root theory, root objectives, or top-level optimization criteria.

checkpoint.description: Create a git checkpoint after validation.

bootstrap_finalize.description: Finalize first-time initialization and delete BOOTSTRAP.md.

registry_review.notes: C4 is reserved for current frontier models with public leaderboard or provider-evaluation evidence at or above the GPT-5.4 / Claude Opus 4.6 baseline.

minimum_baselines.openai: GPT-5.4 or newer mainline/pro frontier models only. GPT-5.4 mini/nano and older GPT-5.x models are not C4.
minimum_baselines.anthropic: Claude Opus 4.6 or newer Opus models only. Sonnet, Haiku, and older Opus models are not C4.
minimum_baselines.cross_provider: Other providers require current public leaderboard parity with GPT-5.4 or Claude Opus 4.6 and explicit project-owner registration.

c4_not_allowed_for: older frontier models below the reviewed baseline
unregistered models without explicit operator override

gpt-5.5-pro.notes: OpenAI's higher-compute GPT-5.5 variant; approved for C4 strategic and safety-critical task classes.

gpt-5.5.notes: Current OpenAI flagship model; leaderboard and provider evaluations place it above the GPT-5.4 C4 baseline.

gpt-5.4-pro.notes: Approved as C4 because GPT-5.4 is the minimum accepted OpenAI frontier baseline and Pro is the higher-accuracy variant.

gpt-5.4.notes: Minimum OpenAI model approved for C4. Earlier GPT-5.x models and cost-optimized GPT-5.4 variants stay below C4.

gpt-5.4-mini.notes: Strong research-engineering and subagent model, but cost-optimized mini variants are not C4.

gpt-5.4-nano.notes: Execution/subagent tier for simpler high-volume tasks; not eligible for C4.

gpt-5.3-codex.notes: Useful coding model retained below C4 because the OpenAI C4 baseline is GPT-5.4 or newer.

gpt-5.2.notes: Retained for research-engineering work only; it is below the reviewed C4 baseline.

claude-opus-4-7.notes: Current generally available Claude Opus model; direct upgrade over Opus 4.6 and approved for C4.

claude-opus-4-6.notes: Minimum Anthropic model approved for C4. Older Opus models and non-Opus Claude models stay below C4.

claude-sonnet-4-6.notes: Strong research-engineering model, but Anthropic C4 requires Opus 4.6 or newer.

claude-opus-4-5.notes: Kept below C4 because the Anthropic C4 baseline is Claude Opus 4.6 or newer.
